legacy.content:
# Phase 37-01 Summary: KAPLAY construction + vector assignment docs
## Completed
1. Updated engine docs to document feature-first vectors (`contentFeatures`, `powerFeatures`) and runtime overrides. 2. Updated API docs with new adapters (`contentFeaturesFromGeneratedSlice`, `withContentFeaturesFromGeneratedSlice`). 3. Updated KAPLAY quickstart with feature-first runtime loading flow. 4. Updated KAPLAY interface spec query params to `contentFeaturesUrl` with legacy alias note.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` passed. - Docs build path validated via `pnpm --dir docs-site run test:e2e` (includes Next.js production build).
